title: Disable File Downloads
excerpt:
Hello everyone. 
In the File column it is possible to leave only the display option by disabling the Download? 
Thanks! :blush:

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone.
In the File column it is possible to leave only the display option by disabling the Download?

Thanks!

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AleRun

At this time, it’s not possible to disable the ability to download information from the Files Column. If you can see the information, you can download it as well.

However, I am going to pass your thoughts to our product team - they take user feedback very seriously! In fact, many of our features began as user requests

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
